world.title: Bop Operations
world.description: Intermediate and advanced mission design with doors, keys, pits, diamonds, and vault logistics.
world.story_intro: Plan routes, manage inventory, and solve larger open arenas with multiple objectives.

levels.title: Gate Warmup
levels.description: Grab a key, unlock the door, and reach the finish.
levels.hint: Pick up the key first. A locked door consumes one key when you step onto it.
levels.tutorial:
# Doors and Keys
Use `grab()` on key tiles, then move through locked doors. Any key opens any locked door.

levels.title: Relay Access
levels.description: Unlock one gate to reach a second key, then open the final gate.
levels.hint: Collect the keys in the right order.
levels.tutorial:
# Multi-door Planning
Plan key usage ahead of time. A key is consumed when unlocking a door, so route order matters.

levels.title: Pit Scout
levels.description: Use a safe route around pits in a larger open arena.
levels.hint: Pits are walkable in path checks but fatal on entry. Consider checking `pit_ahead()` before moving.
levels.tutorial:
# Pit Safety
Use `pit_ahead()` to avoid stepping into a pit tile.

levels.title: Safe Crossing
levels.description: Collect a key, cross a gated chokepoint, and avoid the pit lane.
levels.hint: Use pit_ahead() to check for pits.
levels.tutorial:
# Route Discipline
Separate unsafe pit lanes from safe lanes and commit to a route before coding.

levels.title: Diamond Delivery
levels.description: Collect a diamond, deposit it in a diamond vault, then finish.
levels.hint: `drop()` deposits one item at the matching vault tile.
levels.tutorial:
# Diamond Vaults
Pick up diamonds with `grab()`. Stand on a diamond vault (`W`) and call `drop()` to deposit.

levels.title: Double Diamond Circuit
levels.description: Collect two diamonds, deposit both, then route to the finish.
levels.hint: You can carry multiple diamonds. Deposit each one with `drop()`.
levels.tutorial:
# Inventory and Drop-off
Collecting before depositing can reduce backtracking in large maps.

levels.title: Gem Bank
levels.description: Collect gems, deposit them in a gem vault, and then finish.
levels.hint: Deposit all held gems at `V` before heading to the goal.
levels.tutorial:
# Gem Vault Objectives
`deposit_all_gems` requires no gems left on the grid and no gems in inventory.

levels.title: Mixed Cargo
levels.description: Collect both gems and diamonds, deposit each at the correct vault, then finish.
levels.starter_code:
if gem_here() { grab() }
if diamond_here() { grab() }
levels.hint: You can hold gems and diamonds at the same time, but each vault accepts only one item type.
levels.tutorial:
# Multi-goal Levels
Large maps reward batching: collect items first, then do grouped deposits.

levels.title: Sector Sweep
levels.description: Unlock the sector gate, collect the gem, and return to finish.
levels.starter_code:
if key_here() { grab() }
if gem_here() { grab() }
levels.hint: Use the safe lower lane to approach the door from the left side.
levels.tutorial:
# Open-Ended Navigation
There are multiple valid routes. Favor safer lanes over shortest-looking lanes.

levels.title: Cargo Lock
levels.description: Bring two diamonds through a gate and deposit them before finishing.
levels.starter_code:
if key_here() { grab() }
if diamond_here() { grab() }
levels.hint: Collect the left diamond before crossing the gate so you can batch deposit both diamonds.
levels.tutorial:
# Throughput Planning
Bigger arenas reward fewer crossings between sectors.

levels.title: Operations Maze
levels.description: A single maze-style mission with mixed logistics and a gated crossing.
levels.hint: Collect left-side cargo first, then cross the door once and process vaults on the right.
levels.tutorial:
# Mixed Constraints
This level combines route choice, inventory management, and one controlled chokepoint.

levels.title: Operations Finale
levels.description: Use two keys and two doors while completing full gem and diamond deposit objectives.
levels.hint: Unlock the first door to reach key 2, then use key 2 for the final gate near the goal.
levels.tutorial:
# Finale
Plan in phases: left-side collection, first crossing, deposits, final unlock, finish.
